te / Site Configuration Here you find some links to Site configuration and administration pages. Add links to other pages you may need for your site's configuration here, as necessary. Some links may only apply to certain configurations or skins . T

only apply to certain configurations or skins . The Site group contains configuration pages, and the SiteAdmin group contains administrative pages. Note to new administrators All pages in the 'Site' group (except Site.Side Bar ) are locked for editi

group (except Site.Side Bar ) are locked for editing as the default. Site.SideBar is locked with the site-wide edit password, if one is set. All pages in the 'SiteAdmin' group are locked for reading and editing as the default. In order to edit any lo

nd editing as the default. In order to edit any locked page you need to create in local/config.php a site wide admin password (see Passwords Admin ). Then you can edit pages and change the access protection of individual pages by changing the page a

tection of individual pages by changing the page attributes with ?action=attr . Site group Configuration and Menu Pages PageActions Contains the ' action ' links (like Browse, Edit, History, etc.), placed at the top of the page, see site page actions

aced at the top of the page, see site page actions PageNotFound Page displayed when PmWiki can't find the requested page Preferences Preferences for access keys and edit form Search Search wiki Changes AllRecentChanges Site group sidebar, header, and

s AllRecentChanges Site group sidebar, header, and footer pages Site group sidebar, skin element, headers and footers are used to display common content across a group or entire website. SideBar Site group Form pages Forms are used for display and en

group Form pages Forms are used for display and entry of information. AuthForm Form displayed when requesting a password or username/password EditForm contains the edit page layout form PmFormTemplates Templates for Cookbook:PmForm Site group Quick r

s Templates for Cookbook:PmForm Site group Quick reference pages Quick reference pages are included in other pages to assist in the use of those pages. EditQuickReference quick reference for editing pages Search Search wiki UploadQuickReference Quick

ages Search Search wiki UploadQuickReference Quick reference for uploading pages Site group Template pages Templates are used by page and form directives to control the output displayed. PageListTemplates Templates for PmWiki's Page lists directive P

ates Templates for PmWiki's Page lists directive PmFormTemplates Templates for Cookbook:PmForm Site Administration Here is the list of the pages in the SiteAdmin group. Some links may only apply to certain configurations. Edit - History - Print - Rec
